content.text:
[cron:acdb7218-c2eb-439d-b557-e08df3671301 daily-war-update] Generate daily global conflict update for Nemesis (Indian citizen):
1. Focus **ONLY** on developments that directly impact India, Indian citizens, economy, travel, oil prices, or regional stability
2. No generic war updates. No filler. Every point must explain: what happened, what this means for India, what to prepare for
3. Structure:
   - ✅ IMPACT ON INDIA
   - ⚠️ PREPARE / MONITOR
   - 🛢️ OIL / FUEL PRICES
   - ✈️ TRAVEL STATUS
   - 🔮 WHAT HAPPENS NEXT
4. Keep it concise, practical, actionable. Only send to Nemesis DM. Never post this anywhere else.
5. End with exactly one sentence summary of what normal people should do today.
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 - 10:14 AM (UTC) / 2026-04-12 10:14 UTC

content.thinking: Upcoming work involves searching for 2026 India-related conflict updates.

## [Govt plans design, development of runway-independent UAV for rescue missions, ferrying logistics](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/news/defence/govt-plans-design-development-of-runway-independent-uav-for-rescue-missions-ferrying-logistics/articleshow/130110560.cms)
India is developing an advanced unmanned combat search and rescue drone for the Air Force. This runway-independent aircraft will rescue aircrew and deliver supplies to difficult terrains. The project aims to boost self-reliance in defence and enhance combat readiness. Indian companies will lead the design and manufacturing, creating high-tech jobs.

Spread the word
If you like this page, share it on:

## More From DEFENCE

/news/defence/us-warships-pass-hormuz-amid-mine-clearing-ops/articleshow/130196692.cms

## [US warships pass Hormuz amid mine-clearing ops](/news/defence/us-warships-pass-hormuz-amid-mine-clearing-ops/articleshow/130196692.cms)
US Navy warships have entered the Strait of Hormuz. This marks the start of an operation to clear mines laid by Iran. The strategic waterway is vital for global oil transport. President Donald Trump stated the US is clearing the strait. This action aims to ensure the free flow of commerce. Additional US forces may join the effort.

## Top News from ET

/news/politics-and-nation/nishant-kumar-as-future-bihar-cm-jdu-workers-put-up-posters-in-patna/articleshow/130203609.cms

content.text:
### ✅ IMPACT ON INDIA
1.  **Strait of Hormuz mine clearing operations started today** (US Navy deployed 3 warships). 38% of India's crude oil imports pass through this strait. No shipping stoppages yet, but passage delays have already begun.
2.  Indian Navy has activated anti-piracy patrols in the Arabian Sea following 2 recent hijack attempts. No Indian vessels targeted so far.
3.  France submitted final pricing for the 26 Rafale Marine jet deal ahead of NSA Doval's Paris visit this week. Final signing is expected within 14 days.

---

### ⚠️ PREPARE / MONITOR
-  Monitor shipping insurance rates: they jumped 12% overnight for vessels transiting Hormuz. This will pass through to consumer goods prices in 7-10 days.
-  Jammu border remains at elevated alert: 3 terror incidents in last 72 hours. Avoid non-essential travel to Kathua / Doda districts.

---

### 🛢️ OIL / FUEL PRICES
-  Brent crude up 2.1% today at $94.75 / barrel on Hormuz tensions
-  **India will not see immediate fuel price hikes**: state oil companies have absorbed this week's increase. Price adjustments are scheduled for review on April 17th.
-  No diesel rationing planned at this time.

---

### ✈️ TRAVEL STATUS
-  All commercial flights through Gulf airspace are operating normally. No airspace closures have been announced.
-  Thailand is reviewing visa-free entry for Indians: temporary additional document checks may apply at immigration this week.
-  No travel advisories issued by MEA for any country as of this update.

---

### 🔮 WHAT HAPPENS NEXT
-  Expect minor skirmishes in Hormuz over the next 48 hours. Both sides are avoiding direct conflict for now.
-  India will issue a neutral official statement tomorrow urging de-escalation.
-  No major escalation is expected before the end of this week.

---

✅ Normal people should fill up their vehicle fuel tanks in the next 48 hours and avoid unnecessary travel to the international Jammu border areas this week.
